theory.canonical_statement: The poetic glossary node is normalized as a compact relation between residual vacuum density and a length-dependent tau scale.
theory.technical_interpretation: The equation support layer uses the sequence \rho_{\mathrm{vac}};\tau(L); \rho_{\mathrm{vac}}\longrightarrow\tau(L). These relations are intentionally compact so they can be validated against the cited D-drive source path before source-truth promotion.

dictionary_sections.definition: Poetic Glossary Vacuum-Tau Scale Relation is a source-aligned registry entry whose production packet is anchored by \rho_{\mathrm{vac}}\longrightarrow\tau(L).
dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: The poetic glossary node is normalized as a compact relation between residual vacuum density and a length-dependent tau scale. The entry is kept in the registry because it contributes a specific mathematical or semantic role to the surrounding TZPID sequence.
dictionary_sections.derivable_consequences: The canonical relation supplies a printable equation, a specific symbol key, a Wolfram model, and an equation-support progression for the folder-local production packet.
dictionary_sections.lemma_support: Source alignment; title normalization; canonical-equation repair; symbol-key grounding; TRAWIN closure compatibility.
dictionary_sections.technical_interpretation: The equation support layer uses the sequence \rho_{\mathrm{vac}};\tau(L); \rho_{\mathrm{vac}}\longrightarrow\tau(L). These relations are intentionally compact so they can be validated against the cited D-drive source path before source-truth promotion.
dictionary_sections.equation_grounding: Grounded source: `D:/TZPID/TZPID/ID1409/ID1409.JSON`. The canonical equation is \rho_{\mathrm{vac}}\longrightarrow\tau(L).
dictionary_sections.interpretive_role: This packet turns a weak registry row into a usable production section while preserving a non-destructive approval boundary.
dictionary_sections.tzp_thesaurus:
\begin{enumerate}[leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=6pt,topsep=4pt]
\item Canonical carrier: the relation used as the mathematical spine of the entry.
\item Source alignment: the cited source path that motivates the repaired section packet.
\item TRAWIN closure: the production interpretation through time, rotation, action, wave, integration, and normalization.
\end{enumerate}
dictionary_sections.encyclopedia_mathematica: A suitable visual should show the canonical relation as the central spine, with source context feeding symbols on the left and TRAWIN closure feeding derivation on the right.
